text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Sapporo Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru spots a<n>decorative lilac tree in
the waiting<n>room, and is overjoyed at finding a
supposed good-luck omen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After saying her prayers to the great<n>gods of the
north, she leaves for the<n>track.
